description: 接口自动化、Web自动化、APP自动化全栈实战，从工具到框架的完整方案

articles.title: 接口自动化测试体系：从Postman到Pytest+Requests的进阶之路
articles.excerpt: 系统构建接口自动化测试体系，从Postman工具化测试到Pytest+Requests代码化框架，实现接口测试的工程化升级。
articles.author: 测试工程师
articles.content:
## 接口自动化测试的层次

接口自动化测试分为三个层次：

1. **工具层**：Postman/JMeter快速验证
2. **代码层**：Pytest+Requests框架化
3. **平台层**：自研测试平台

## Postman接口测试

### 环境配置

```json
{
  "name": "Staging",
  "values": [
    {"key": "base_url", "value": "https://staging-api.example.com"},
    {"key": "token", "value": ""}
  ]
}
```

### 集合与变量

```
Collection: 用户模块
├── 登录接口（设置token变量）
├── 获取用户信息
├── 更新用户信息
└── 删除用户
```

### Pre-request Script

```javascript
pm.environment.set("timestamp", new Date().getTime());
const sign = CryptoJS.MD5(pm.environment.get("app_key") + pm.environment.get("timestamp") + pm.environment.get("app_secret"));
pm.environment.set("sign", sign.toString());
```

### Tests断言

```javascript
pm.test("Status code is 200", () => {
    pm.response.to.have.status(200);
});

pm.test("Response has token", () => {
    const json = pm.response.json();
    pm.expect(json.data.token).to.be.a('string');
    pm.environment.set("token", json.data.token);
});
```

## Pytest+Requests框架

### 项目结构

```
api_test_framework/
├── config/
│   ├── config.yaml
│   └── logging.conf
├── api/
│   ├── __init__.py
│   ├── base_api.py
│   └── user_api.py
├── testcases/
│   ├── __init__.py
│   ├── conftest.py
│   └── test_user.py
├── data/
│   └── user_data.yaml
├── utils/
│   ├── __init__.py
│   └── auth.py
├── reports/
└── conftest.py
```

### 基础API封装

```python
import requests
import logging

class BaseAPI:
    def __init__(self, base_url, token=None):
        self.base_url = base_url
        self.session = requests.Session()
        if token:
            self.session.headers.update({'Authorization': f'Bearer {token}'})
    
    def request(self, method, path, **kwargs):
        url = f'{self.base_url}{path}'
        response = self.session.request(method, url, **kwargs)
        logging.info(f'{method} {path} -> {response.status_code}')
        return response
    
    def get(self, path, **kwargs):
        return self.request('GET', path, **kwargs)
    
    def post(self, path, **kwargs):
        return self.request('POST', path, **kwargs)
```

### 数据驱动

```yaml
data:
  - title: 正常登录
    username: admin
    password: admin123
    expected_status: 200
    expected_code: 0
  
  - title: 密码错误
    username: admin
    password: wrong
    expected_status: 200
    expected_code: 1001
  
  - title: 账号不存在
    username: nonexistent
    password: any
    expected_status: 200
    expected_code: 1002
```

```python
import pytest
import yaml

@pytest.fixture
def login_data():
    with open('data/login.yaml') as f:
        return yaml.safe_load(f)['data']

@pytest.mark.parametrize('case', login_data())
def test_login(api_client, case):
    response = api_client.post('/api/login', json={
        'username': case['username'],
        'password': case['password']
    })
    assert response.status_code == case['expected_status']
    assert response.json()['code'] == case['expected_code']
```

## JMeter接口自动化

### 脚本结构

```
Test Plan
├── User Defined Variables
├── HTTP Cookie Manager
├── Thread Group
│   ├── Login (HTTP Request)
│   │   └── JSON Extractor (token)
│   ├── Get Profile (HTTP Request)
│   └── Response Assertion
└── View Results Tree
```

## 总结

接口自动化测试从工具到代码是一个自然的演进过程。Postman适合快速验证和团队协作，Pytest+Requests适合构建可持续维护的自动化框架，JMeter适合性能和接口双重验证。选择哪种方式取决于团队的技术能力和项目需求。

articles.title: Web自动化测试进阶：从Selenium到Playwright再到MCP的演进
articles.excerpt: Web自动化测试的技术演进，从Selenium的基础到Playwright的现代方案，再到MCP驱动的AI浏览器自动化。
articles.author: 测试工程师
articles.content:
## Web自动化的三代技术

| 代际 | 工具 | 核心特点 |
|------|------|----------|
| 第一代 | Selenium | WebDriver协议，生态成熟 |
| 第二代 | Playwright | 自动等待，多浏览器 |
| 第三代 | MCP+Playwright | AI驱动，自然语言控制 |

## Selenium实战

### 环境搭建

```bash
pip install selenium
# 下载对应浏览器WebDriver
```

### Page Object模式

```python
from selenium.webdriver.common.by import By
from selenium.webdriver.support.ui import WebDriverWait
from selenium.webdriver.support import expected_conditions as EC

class LoginPage:
    username_input = (By.ID, 'username')
    password_input = (By.ID, 'password')
    login_button = (By.CSS_SELECTOR, 'button[type="submit"]')
    error_message = (By.CLASS_NAME, 'error-msg')
    
    def __init__(self, driver):
        self.driver = driver
        self.wait = WebDriverWait(driver, 10)
    
    def login(self, username, password):
        self.wait.until(EC.presence_of_element_located(self.username_input)).send_keys(username)
        self.driver.find_element(*self.password_input).send_keys(password)
        self.driver.find_element(*self.login_button).click()
        return self
    
    def get_error_message(self):
        return self.wait.until(EC.visibility_of_element_located(self.error_message)).text
```

### 测试用例

```python
import pytest
from selenium import webdriver

@pytest.fixture
def driver():
    driver = webdriver.Chrome()
    driver.maximize_window()
    yield driver
    driver.quit()

def test_login_success(driver):
    login_page = LoginPage(driver)
    driver.get('https://example.com/login')
    login_page.login('admin', 'admin123')
    assert 'dashboard' in driver.current_url

def test_login_wrong_password(driver):
    login_page = LoginPage(driver)
    driver.get('https://example.com/login')
    login_page.login('admin', 'wrong')
    assert '密码错误' in login_page.get_error_message()
```

## Playwright实战

### 环境搭建

```bash
pip install playwright
playwright install
```

### 自动等待优势

```python
from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright

with sync_playwright() as p:
    browser = p.chromium.launch()
    page = browser.new_page()
    page.goto('https://example.com/login')
    
    page.fill('#username', 'admin')
    page.fill('#password', 'admin123')
    page.click('button[type="submit"]')
    
    page.wait_for_url('**/dashboard')
    assert page.title() == 'Dashboard'
    
    browser.close()
```

### 网络拦截

```python
def test_api_mock(page):
    page.route('**/api/user', lambda route: route.fulfill(
        status=200,
        content_type='application/json',
        body='{"name": "mock_user"}'
    ))
    page.goto('https://example.com/profile')
    assert page.text_content('.user-name') == 'mock_user'
```

### Trace调试

```python
browser = p.chromium.launch()
context = browser.new_context()
context.tracing.start(screenshots=True, snapshots=True)
page = context.new_page()

page.goto('https://example.com')

context.tracing.stop(path='trace.zip')
```

## MCP+Playwright：AI浏览器自动化

### 配置MCP Server

```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "playwright": {
      "command": "npx",
      "args": ["-y", "@playwright/mcp"]
    }
  }
}
```

### 自然语言控制浏览器

```
请帮我执行以下测试：
1. 打开 https://example.com/login
2. 输入用户名 admin 和密码 admin123
3. 点击登录按钮
4. 验证页面跳转到 dashboard
5. 截图保存结果
```

## 三代技术对比

| 维度 | Selenium | Playwright | MCP+Playwright |
|------|----------|-----------|----------------|
| 学习成本 | 中 | 低 | 极低 |
| 执行速度 | 慢 | 快 | 中 |
| 稳定性 | 中 | 高 | 高 |
| 维护成本 | 高 | 低 | 极低 |
| 灵活性 | 高 | 高 | 中 |

## 总结

Web自动化测试从Selenium到Playwright再到MCP，是技术不断简化的过程。Selenium生态成熟但维护成本高，Playwright体验优秀是当前最佳选择，MCP+Playwright代表了AI驱动的未来方向。建议新项目直接使用Playwright，已有Selenium项目逐步迁移。

articles.title: APP自动化测试实战：Appium+鸿蒙+iOS全平台覆盖
articles.excerpt: APP自动化测试全平台实战，从Appium基础到鸿蒙系统适配，再到iOS非Mac环境的自动化方案。
articles.author: 测试工程师
articles.content:
## APP自动化测试的挑战

APP自动化比Web自动化面临更多挑战：

- 多平台（Android/iOS/鸿蒙）
- 设备碎片化
- 环境依赖复杂
- iOS必须Mac环境

## Appium基础

### 环境搭建

```bash
# 安装Appium
npm install -g appium
appium driver install uiautomator2
appium driver install xcuitest

# 安装Appium Inspector
# 从 https://github.com/appium/appium-inspector 下载
```

### Android自动化

```python
from appium import webdriver
from appium.options.android import UiAutomator2Options

options = UiAutomator2Options()
options.platform_name = 'Android'
options.device_name = 'emulator-5554'
options.app = '/path/to/app.apk'
options.automation_name = 'UiAutomator2'

driver = webdriver.Remote('http://localhost:4723', options=options)

element = driver.find_element('id', 'com.example:id/username')
element.send_keys('admin')

driver.find_element('id', 'com.example:id/login_btn').click()

driver.quit()
```

### Page Object模式

```python
class LoginPage:
    def __init__(self, driver):
        self.driver = driver
    
    def enter_username(self, username):
        self.driver.find_element('id', 'username').send_keys(username)
        return self
    
    def enter_password(self, password):
        self.driver.find_element('id', 'password').send_keys(password)
        return self
    
    def click_login(self):
        self.driver.find_element('id', 'login_btn').click()
        return HomePage(self.driver)
    
    def login(self, username, password):
        return self.enter_username(username).enter_password(password).click_login()
```

## 鸿蒙系统APP自动化

### 鸿蒙与Android的差异

| 维度 | Android | 鸿蒙(HarmonyOS) |
|------|---------|------------------|
| 自动化框架 | UiAutomator2 | Hdc + DevEco Testing |
| 元素定位 | resource-id | component-id |
| 调试工具 | adb | hdc |
| 包格式 | .apk | .hap |

### 鸿蒙自动化环境

```bash
# 安装hdc工具
# 从DevEco Studio中获取

# 连接设备
hdc list targets

# 安装应用
hdc install /path/to/app.hap

# 启动应用
hdc shell aa start -a EntryAbility -b com.example.app
```

### 鸿蒙自动化脚本

```python
import subprocess

class HarmonyOSDriver:
    def __init__(self, device_id=None):
        self.device_id = device_id
        self.hdc_prefix = f'hdc -t {device_id}' if device_id else 'hdc'
    
    def execute_command(self, cmd):
        result = subprocess.run(
            f'{self.hdc_prefix} {cmd}',
            shell=True, capture_output=True, text=True
        )
        return result.stdout.strip()
    
    def tap(self, x, y):
        self.execute_command(f'shell uitest uiInput click {x} {y}')
    
    def input_text(self, text):
        self.execute_command(f'shell uitest uiInput inputText {text}')
    
    def find_element(self, **kwargs):
        if 'id' in kwargs:
            return self.execute_command(f'shell uitest uiInput search id={kwargs["id"]}')
```

## iOS自动化（非Mac环境方案）

### 方案1：云真机服务

使用AWS Device Farm、BrowserStack等云服务：

```python
from browserstack.local import Local

bs_local = Local()
bs_local.start({'key': 'your_key'})

options = {
    'deviceName': 'iPhone 15',
    'platformName': 'iOS',
    'app': 'bs://app_id',
    'bstack:options': {
        'userName': 'your_username',
        'accessKey': 'your_access_key'
    }
}

driver = webdriver.Remote('https://hub-cloud.browserstack.com/wd/hub', options)
```

### 方案2：iPhone安装自动化应用

在iPhone上安装支持自动化的应用：

1. 通过TestFlight安装WebDriverAgent
2. 配置iPhone的辅助功能
3. 使用Appium连接远程iPhone

### 方案3：Mac云主机

租用Mac云主机运行Xcode和WebDriverAgent：

```bash
# 在Mac云主机上
xcodebuild -project WebDriverAgent.xcodeproj \
  -scheme WebDriverAgentRunner \
  -destination 'id=device_udid' \
  test

# 本地通过Appium连接
appium --address 0.0.0.0 --port 4723
```

## 总结

APP自动化测试需要覆盖Android、iOS、鸿蒙三大平台。Android使用Appium+UiAutomator2最成熟，鸿蒙需要使用hdc+DevEco Testing工具链，iOS在非Mac环境下可以通过云真机、远程Mac等方案解决。关键是根据团队实际情况选择最合适的方案。

articles.title: Pytest+Requests接口自动化框架：从零搭建企业级方案
articles.excerpt: 从零搭建一个完整的Pytest+Requests接口自动化框架，涵盖鉴权封装、数据驱动、Allure报告、多环境切换等企业级需求。
articles.author: 测试工程师
articles.content:
## 框架设计目标

1. 低代码编写用例
2. 数据驱动，业务与数据分离
3. 多环境一键切换
4. 自动生成Allure报告
5. CI/CD无缝集成

## 项目结构

```
api_automation/
├── config/
│   ├── dev.yaml
│   ├── staging.yaml
│   └── prod.yaml
├── api/
│   ├── base_api.py
│   ├── user_api.py
│   └── order_api.py
├── testcases/
│   ├── conftest.py
│   ├── test_user.py
│   └── test_order.py
├── data/
│   ├── user_data.yaml
│   └── order_data.yaml
├── utils/
│   ├── auth.py
│   ├── logger.py
│   └── db.py
├── reports/
├── conftest.py
├── pytest.ini
└── requirements.txt
```

## 核心模块实现

### 配置管理

```python
import yaml
import os

class Config:
    env = os.getenv('TEST_ENV', 'staging')
    
    with open(f'config/{env}.yaml') as f:
        _config = yaml.safe_load(f)
    
    @classmethod
    def get(cls, key, default=None):
        return cls._config.get(key, default)
    
    @property
    def base_url(self):
        return self._config['base_url']
```

### 鉴权封装

```python
class AuthManager:
    _token_cache = {}
    
    @classmethod
    def get_token(cls, role='admin'):
        if role in cls._token_cache:
            return cls._token_cache[role]
        
        credentials = {
            'admin': {'username': 'admin', 'password': 'admin123'},
            'user': {'username': 'testuser', 'password': 'user123'}
        }
        
        response = requests.post(
            f'{Config.get("base_url")}/api/login',
            json=credentials[role]
        )
        token = response.json()['data']['token']
        cls._token_cache[role] = token
        return token
```

### conftest.py

```python
import pytest

@pytest.fixture(scope='session')
def api_client():
    from api.base_api import BaseAPI
    client = BaseAPI(Config.get('base_url'))
    yield client
    client.session.close()

@pytest.fixture(scope='session')
def admin_client():
    from api.base_api import BaseAPI
    token = AuthManager.get_token('admin')
    client = BaseAPI(Config.get('base_url'), token=token)
    yield client
    client.session.close()
```

### Allure集成

```python
import allure

@allure.feature('用户模块')
@allure.story('登录')
@allure.title('{case[title]}')
@allure.severity(allure.severity_level.CRITICAL)
@pytest.mark.parametrize('case', login_data())
def test_login(admin_client, case):
    with allure.step(f'执行登录: {case["username"]}'):
        response = admin_client.post('/api/login', json={
            'username': case['username'],
            'password': case['password']
        })
    
    with allure.step('验证响应'):
        assert response.status_code == case['expected_status']
        assert response.json()['code'] == case['expected_code']
```

## CI集成

```yaml
name: API Test
on: [push]
jobs:
  test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - run: pip install -r requirements.txt
      - run: pytest --alluredir=results
      - uses: allure-framework/allure-action@v1
```

## 总结

企业级接口自动化框架的核心是：配置管理实现多环境切换，鉴权封装简化Token处理，数据驱动降低用例编写成本，Allure报告提升可读性，CI集成实现持续测试。

articles.title: 前端开发Skill与Web自动化：测试工程师的前端能力进阶
articles.excerpt: 测试工程师需要掌握的前端开发技能，从HTML/CSS/JS基础到Vue组件开发，提升Web自动化测试的深度和广度。
articles.author: 测试工程师
